lines.en_lit: he is not dealing with the incense.

Ulla said: a goat that he slaughtered before presentation of the blood of the bull, he did nothing. we learned he performed the blood of the goat before the blood of the bull, he repeat and sprinkle the blood of the goat after the blood of the bull. And if it is so should have said he must return and slaughter Ulla interpreted to the presentations in the Sanctuary And likewise, Rabbi Afes said to the presentations in the Sanctuary.

And similarly in the Sanctuary, and likewise on the golden altar, The Sages taught: “And he shall make atonement for the most sacred place,” this is the innermost sanctum, “the Tent of Meeting,” this is the Sanctuary; “altar” as per its plain meaning; “he shall make atonement,” is these are the courtyards.

“The priests” as per its plain meaning; “people of the assembly,” these are the Israelites; “he shall make atonement,” these are the Levites, They are all equated in one atonement that they all achieve atonement through the scapegoat other transgressions, the statement of Rabbi Yehuda.

Rabbi Shimon says: Just as the blood of the goat presented inside atones for Israelites with the ritual impurity of the Temple and its consecrated objects, so too, the blood of the bull atones for the priests with the ritual impurity of the Temple and its consecrated objects. And just as the confession over the scapegoat atones for Israelites with regard to all other transgressions, so too, the confession over the bull atones for the priests with regard to all other transgressions,

The Sages taught “And when he has finished atoning for the sacred place,” this is the innermost sanctum, “Tent of Meeting,” this is the Sanctuary; “altar,” as per its plain meaning. teaches that they each a separate atonement unto themselves,

From here stated: presented some of the presentations inside and the blood spilled, he brings other blood and begins from the start of the presentations inside. Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon say: he begins only from the place where he stopped. he finished the presentations inside and the blood spilled, he brings other blood and starts at the beginning of the presentations in the Sanctuary.

he presented some of the presentations in the Sanctuary and the blood spilled, he brings other blood and begins from the start in the Sanctuary, Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon say: He begins only from the place where he stopped.

he finished the presentations in the Sanctuary and the blood spilled, he brings other blood and begins at the start of the presentations at the altar, he presented some of the presentations at the altar and the blood spilled, he brings other blood and begins at the start of the presentations at the altar, Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon say he begins from the place where he stopped. he finished the presentations at the altar and the blood spilled everyone agrees are not indispensable,
Rabbi Yoḥanan said: And both of them, derived from one verse: with the blood of the sin-offering of atonement once a year
Rabbi Meir holds I said to you one sin-offering and not two sin-offerings. Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon hold I said to you one sprinkling and not two sprinklings.
It was taught Rabbi said: Rabbi Ya’akov differentiated for me to lugin.

And not But wasn’t it taught he presented some of the presentations that inside and the log spilled, he brings another log and begins from the start of the presentations in the Sanctuary; Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon say: He begins from the place where he stopped.

he finished the presentations in the Sanctuary and the log spilled, he brings another log and begins from the start of the presentations the thumbs he put some of the presentations on thumbs and the log spilled, he brings another log and begins from the start of the presentations on thumbs. Rabbi Elazar and Rabbi Shimon say: He begins from the place where he stopped. he finished the presentations on his thumbs and the log spilled, everyone agrees the presentations on the head are not indispensable.
say: Rabbi Ya’akov taught me with regard to lugin.

The Master said presentations of the head are not indispensable. What is the reason If we say because it is written: “And the rest of the oil however, if so, “But the rest of the meal-offering so too, that they are not indispensable?
It is different there, as it is written “And of the rest “And of the rest
